title: ReвЏЄ Kрџ§  ПЂрџЊЂ TГєрџ«µ L@рџ—ЈпёЏ: Privacy-first offline meeting minutes PWA
description:
ReвЏЄ Kрџ§  ПЂрџЊЂ TГєрџ«µ L@рџ—ЈпёЏ is an installable, offline-first Progressive Web App for structured meeting minutes. It combines local dictation, threaded contributions, key-point extraction, task tracking, observations, and branded A4 PDF export in a browser-only workflow.

The project is designed for desktop and mobile use, with no mandatory backend and a privacy-first offline mode powered by Whisper.
notes: Includes configurable export branding and colors, local autosave, and browser/mobile support.
